author: anon-59ff128d
content: Added a HashMap<PathBuf, String> content cache in run_json_mode(). The inner loop now checks the cache before reading from disk. After each successful engine::apply that produces output text, the cache is updated with the new content. This ensures operations compose: each operation sees the result of the previous one rather than the original disk content. The cache is updated regardless of dry_run mode so that dry-run diffs are also correct when multiple operations target the same file. All existing tests pass (226 core + 30 fs + 68 json + 24 cli unit + all integration tests).
